subject: Two alien elongated creatures with fanged mouths and clawed limbs in a rocky canyon setting, one appearing to grapple or carry the other
description: Two alien-looking creatures occupy the frame against a background of orange and dark canyon rock walls. The larger primary figure is tall and lean with elongated limbs, a teal-blue body, a craned neck ending in a tooth-filled head, and a long flat tail extending behind it. It appears to be holding or carrying a smaller, similarly alien green-tinted creature with multiple clawed limbs. Both creatures have a distinctly alien or eldrazi-adjacent aesthetic — no fur or feathers, smooth or lightly textured skin. Small atmospheric wisps trail from the ground. The palette contrasts the warm orange rock with the cool blue-green of the creatures.
foreground: tall teal alien creature holding a smaller green creature
background: orange and dark red canyon rock walls
